name: reuse-first-check
description: Verify /cook spawns reuse-scout before creating a new service/handler/util when prior art exists in the fixture.
prompt: /cook Phase 1: Add a createUser handler for api/user surface. The user service already exists in api/admin and api/public — reuse before fork.
rationale: Reuse-First is the core claudex-kit anti-drift rule. Cross-surface duplication (admin/public/user) is the exact scenario it was built for. If /cook forks here it bypassed reuse-scout, which is a hard-gate violation.
